features.title: All models at once
features.text: GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, Midjourney and 200+ models — one account and a shared balance.

features.title: No subscription
features.text: Pay per message with credits. No $20/month plans — spend only on what you use.

features.title: API for developers
features.text: OpenAI-compatible API. Plug in Cursor, VS Code or your own product.

features.title: Text, images and video
features.text: Chat, image and video generation — in a single interface.

comparisonRows: GPT, Claude and Gemini in one place
home.pricingSubtitle: Top up your balance and spend it on any model. Credits never expire.

pricing.title: Rate
pricing.sub: credits — a message costs a few hundred

faq.a: Your balance is measured in credits. Each message costs a few hundred credits depending on the model. Credits never expire, and you can top up any amount starting from $1.
With cryptocurrency: USDT or TON via @CryptoBot in Telegram. Choose an amount, pay the invoice, and your balance updates automatically within seconds.
GPT-4o, GPT-4o mini, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Gemini 1.5 Pro, DeepSeek V3, Mistral, Llama and 200+ more. For images: Stable Diffusion, Flux and Midjourney-compatible models. For video: Sora, Veo and Kling.

faq.q: Is there an API for developers?
faq.a: Yes. The API is OpenAI-compatible — just change the base_url and API key. Works with Cursor, VS Code (Continue) and any OpenAI-compatible application.
No. There are no monthly plans — you pay only for the messages you send. Top up once and use any model until your credits run out.

faq.q: What if the AI gives a bad answer?
faq.a: Every message has a Regenerate button — the AI produces a new answer at no extra charge. If a technical error occurs, your credits are refunded automatically.

home.finalText: 1,000 credits free. No card, no subscription.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

footer.description: All AI models in one place. GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini and more — pay per message, no subscription.
